summary: Iteration 83 backend testing completed successfully. All 16 tests passed (100%). Tested the new 'Tempi Produzione' feature: PUT /api/commesse/{cid}/produzione/{fase_tipo} now accepts started_at, completed_at, operator_name fields. Backend stores these new fields alongside existing data_inizio, data_fine for backward compatibility. GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops returns fasi_produzione with new fields when set (null-safe). PDF Fascicolo Tecnico uses completed_at with fallback to data_fine. Regression tests confirm C/L workflow (rientro, verifica) still works.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend implementation is correct: FaseUpdate model accepts started_at, completed_at, operator_name (all Optional[str])
Backward compatible: Both old fields (data_inizio, data_fine) and new fields (started_at, completed_at) are stored
PDF _build_cap1 uses cascading fallback: completed_at -> data_completamento -> data_fine
Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js has dialog data-testid='dialog-fase-completa' with datetime inputs and operator field
test_credentials: MongoDB session tokens created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with initialized fasi_produzione created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 adds production timing fields (started_at, completed_at, operator_name) to fasi_produzione. Key endpoints: PUT /api/commesse/{cid}/produzione/{fase_tipo} accepts new fields in JSON body, GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops returns fasi with new fields. Frontend has dialog data-testid='dialog-fase-completa' with inputs data-testid='input-fase-started', 'input-fase-completed', 'input-fase-operator'. Backward compatibility preserved: both old (data_inizio, data_fine) and new fields are stored.

avvia_fase_with_started_at.details: PUT produzione with stato='in_corso' and started_at saves both started_at and data_inizio

completa_fase_with_all_fields.details: PUT produzione with stato='completato', started_at, completed_at, operator_name saves all fields

completa_fase_only_completed_at.details: PUT produzione with only completed_at works correctly

completa_fase_only_operator_name.details: PUT produzione with only operator_name works, auto-fills data_fine

backward_compat_update_without_new_field.details: PUT produzione without new fields still works (data_inizio auto-set)

backward_compat_complete_without_new_fie.details: PUT completato without new fields uses auto-timestamps for data_fine

backward_compat_data_preserved.details: New fields coexist with old operatore and note fields

get_ops_returns_new_fields.details: GET ops returns fasi_produzione with started_at, completed_at, operator_name accessible

get_ops_null_safe.details: GET ops doesn't error when new fields are absent
